summary: Settlement compensation added for payout failures after successful treasury fee transfer; extra edge-case tests added.
highlights: Added best-effort treasury fee compensation when payout fails after fee transfer
Extended settlement tests for fee-revert success and failure paths
Kept runtime behavior stable while hardening economic failure scenarios
versioning_note: External zip names progressed from ma47..ma57 while the internal working directory remains ma44. BUILD_INFO.json is the authoritative snapshot marker inside the bundle.
notes: Settlement path now attempts to restore escrow if payout fails after treasury fee succeeded.
